channel.title: Blog | Making Complexity Invisible
channel.description: Connecting people, processes, applications, and data. Better orchestration. Less complexity. More focus on what matters.

item.title: Recover Deleted or Overwritten Content from a Backup Content Database
item.description: This article explains how to temporarily restore and register an older WEBCON Content database in order to recover deleted or overwritten application objects when no *.bpe export is available. It covers the required SQL configuration changes, how to switch between Content databases in Designer Studio, and how to remove the temporary database entry after the recovery process is completed.

item.title: Data Source with all Workflows with On Start (Cyclical)
item.description: This describes a solution that displays an overview in the Portal of all workflows with "on start (cyclical)" executions.

item.title: Multiple Windows Shortcuts to Designer Studio
item.description: Create multiple windows shortcuts to start Designer Studio in different environments with different versions.

item.title: WEBCON Integration with Microsoft Fabric SQL Analytics Endpoint
item.description: Learn how to connect a Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse SQL analytics endpoint to WEBCON using a Microsoft Entra service principal.

item.title: OpenStreetMap Integration in Portal with Leaflet
item.description: How to integrate OpenStreetMap to the WEBCON portal easily with Leaflet to gain functionality in processes for e.g. point of interests search, navigation, display in maps.

item.title: Powershell via Rest Api Endpoints with Support for Return of Parameters
item.description: How to use "PowerShell Universal" (PSU) as a solution to return an object after an invoke of a PowerShell script.ö

item.title: Disable "Unsaved Data" Alert When Leaving A Form
item.description: How to disable the alert window if the form is dirty because it is containing unsaved data changes.
